steps.observed: Email not found (inbox was already empty or cleared)
Email with id 'KtZdqvte' found in Maildev inbox, sent to test@example.com

steps.action: Extract OTP from Maildev email body
steps.observed: OTP code '788817' found in email body (6 digits)

evidence.emailText:
Use este codigo para continuar el ingreso o registro transparente en SIMUT Tulua.

Codigo: 788817

Si usted no solicito este codigo, ignore este correo.

assertions.title: OTP notification record created

steps.expected: notification_delivery row created with templateKey, status, recipient
steps.observed: No notification_delivery row found for the OTP email

steps.action: Query SQLite: SELECT * FROM notification_delivery WHERE recipient LIKE '%test%'
steps.expected: Row with templateKey related to OTP (e.g., 'otp-sign-in' or 'sign-in')
steps.observed: No rows returned - notification_delivery table is empty

evidence.databaseQuery: SELECT * FROM notification_delivery ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;

assertions.issues: OTP emails are sent via auth.mailer.ts::sendVerificationOtpEmail which directly uses nodemailer without creating a notification_delivery record. The notification.service.ts handles booking lifecycle emails (confirmation, cancellation, hold expiration) but has no OTP template. This is a gap: OTP notifications should create notification_delivery records for auditability.

frictions.description: Initial OTP request failed because the API requires 'type' field in body - the task description omitted this required parameter
frictions.resolution: Retried with correct body format: {email, type:sign-in}

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-NOTIF-001, VAL-NOTIF-002), 1 failed (VAL-NOTIF-003). OTP email is sent correctly and contains valid 6-digit code (788817). However, OTP notifications do NOT create notification_delivery records because auth.mailer.ts sends emails directly via nodemailer without going through notification.service.ts. The notification service only handles booking lifecycle emails (booking-confirmation, booking-cancellation, booking-hold-expired) but has no OTP template.
